mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_comment ( market_id, member_id, content, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{marketId}, #{memberId}, #{content}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, market_id, member_id, content, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM market_comment WHERE id = #{commentId} AND market_id = #{marketId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_comment WHERE market_id = #{marketId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, market_id, member_id, content, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM market_comment WHERE market_id = #{marketId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
